retroactive_reason: Orchestrator landed W13C commit (b4bbc62c) without manifest after OOM cut the W13C agent mid-sweep. This manifest reconstructs status from commit log and Wave-13 backlog scope (B2#37-42 cosmetic + A2 W3 hermite quantitative floor).

B2_37_pytest_randomly_doc_comment.notes: Expanded pytest-randomly dev-deps comment to document the deliberate local-vs-CI behavior: local runs exercise random order (state-leak surfacing) but CI disables via -p no:randomly (deterministic flake triage). Source-of-truth comment so the local/CI mismatch (W11D documented gap) is visible at the dep declaration.

B2_38_suppress_convergence_warnings_auto.reason: Architectural change requires audit of every test importing pytest.warns(ConvergenceWarning); deferred to dedicated wave (per W12D triage).

A2_W3_hermite_quantitative_floor.reason: OOM cut agent before A2 W3 strengthening pass. Tracked for W14B follow-up. Currently weak assert; W11B cd6669a6 added skipif under NUMBA_DISABLE_JIT=1 but quantitative floor still directional.
